content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — description claims "Built-in ad blocker," "AI-powered suggestions," and "Works fully offline," but ContentView.swift only implements a simple in-memory task list with no ad-blocking, ML/AI, or persistence code (App/ContentView.swift:1-24; fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt:1-3).
Pierre: Apple rejects apps whose marketing overstates functionality that isn't actually present, since it misleads users and reviewers. Here three prominent claims — ad blocker, AI-powered suggestions, and full offline support — have no corresponding implementation or imports (no CoreML, no content-blocker extension, no local storage). Either add the real features or remove/soften these claims before submission.
